Home → Discography → The Midwest Cowboy

The Midwest Cowboy

2006 · Real Talk Entertainment

The third of four albums Bizzy Bone released in 2006, distributed via Koch Entertainment. Production handled entirely by Playalitical with a diverse sound ranging from g-funk to synth melodies. Features guest appearances from Young Droop, Playalitical and Spoke-In-Wordz. Considered by many fans to be one of his stronger independent releases.

"And one for the love of the Lord and Heavenly Father we need us a sword, But we know no weapons are formed."

— Come, Go, See, Know
